rationale: In the citing paper, Foubert and Gijsbrechts (2007) appears only in the Appendix Table A1 note as one item in a grouped list of studies excluded from the authors' focal conditional-promotion review, and in the reference list. The main conceptual development, hypotheses, and studies do not discuss this paper's findings, mechanisms, or methods. Because it is not given a distinct role in framing or supporting the focal argument, this is a passing/background citation.
